name: jiangyue-knowledge-curator
description: Codex skill plugin for curating Jiangyue website knowledge, visual evidence, approved materials, failure cases, product fact boundaries, and competitor references into the local brand-system knowledge base.

interface.shortDescription: Curate Jiangyue website knowledge and visual evidence.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for semi-automatically collecting website task outputs, image failures, approved reference materials, product fact boundaries, visual standards, and competitor references into a local brand-system knowledge base after user confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-knowledge-curator to organize Jiangyue website outputs, failures, references, and confirmed materials into the brand-system knowledge base.
Use $jiangyue-knowledge-curator to turn a completed image task into a short curation card for user confirmation.
Use $jiangyue-knowledge-curator to update approved materials, failure cases, product fact boundaries, and competitor references after confirmation.
